title: ONE FOR ALL URC6821 Big Button Universal Remote Control

crossSellProducts.title: DURACELL Plus 9V Alkaline Battery - Pack of 2

offers: Spread the cost on orders £99 & over.
Get up to 2 months of Apple Music, Apple Fitness+ and Apple Arcade with this product.

description.main: This universal remote has big buttons and light-up colour coded keys for clear, simple control. You can control up to 2 devices from a single remote and banish the clutter on your coffee table. It works with all brands and can be used for TVs, set top boxes, and IR streaming devices.
goodToKnow: Control the volume (or mute) your sound bar with SimpleAudio
Add functions from your current remotes using the learning feature
Easily link new devices in just 3 steps with SimpleSet
